name: bayeux
description: Embroidered Bayeux-tapestry style on beige linen — the project namesake.
style_suffix: in the style of the Bayeux Tapestry, embroidered on beige linen, stylized figures with outlined contours, muted reds, blues, greens, and ochres, flat perspective, Latin-style captions sewn along the top border, historical needlework texture
